Commercial Office Lease Agreement: This Commercial Lease Agreement is made between Pinnacle Properties LLC ("Landlord") and DataStack Inc ("Tenant") for premises located at 450 Market Street, Suite 800, San Francisco, CA 94105. The lease term is three years commencing February 1, 2024, with base monthly rent of $52,500 subject to annual CPI adjustments not to exceed 5%. Tenant is responsible for all utilities, and a security deposit of $157,500 (three months' rent) has been received. Tenant may not sublet or assign the lease without prior written consent from Landlord.
